description.en: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) on your Supabase database.
description.de: Eine PostgreSQL-Funktion (RPC) auf deiner Supabase-Datenbank aufrufen.
description.es: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) on your Supabase database.
description.fr: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) on your Supabase database.
description.ro: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) on your Supabase database.
description.it: Call a PostgreSQL function (RPC) on your Supabase database.

vars.SUPABASE_KEY: env:SUPABASE_KEY|Your Supabase anon or service_role key from Project Settings > API.

inputs.name: Function Name

description.en: The name of the PostgreSQL function to call.
description.es: The name of the PostgreSQL function to call.
description.fr: The name of the PostgreSQL function to call.
description.ro: The name of the PostgreSQL function to call.
description.it: The name of the PostgreSQL function to call.

inputs.bot: The name of the database function (RPC) to call.

inputs.name: Arguments
inputs.bot: JSON object of named arguments to pass to the function. Example: {"user_id": 123, "limit_count": 10}
